name: qualia-v4-cross-qverse-badge
description: When the active context has edges whose target node isn't in-context, a corner badge should count them.

checkpoints.name: no-badge-in-clean-context
checkpoints.description: In the top-right corner area of the viewport (below the toolbar, right side, NOT inside a panel), no 'cross-qverse edge' badge should be visible. Pass if you see no such corner pill. Fail if you see a teal-bordered pill with an upward-arrow icon and a count anywhere in that region.
